def: Above or beyond what is human; sometimes, divine; as,superhuman strength; superhuman wisdom.
Loss of the sense of smell.
A constellation. See Auriga, and Wagones.
Having the form or appearance of three petals; appearing as iffurnished with three petals.
To consign beforehand; to make a previous consignment of.
A wedge-shaped stone used in an arch; a voussoir.
One who strives to put another under obligation; an officiousperson; hence, a flatterer. Used also adjectively.Smiling pickthanks, and base newsmongers. Shak.
Anything made of iron; -- a general name of such parts orpieces of a building, vessel, carriage, etc., as consist of iron.
A stanchion or post of wood or iron, with two arms forsupporting a boom, spare yards, etc.; -- called also crane andcrutch. Totten.
To employ or place so as to make alliteration. Skeat.
